diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export, exported types (Context, Handler types, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: (none - re-exports only)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Barrel file re-exporting main Hono class and public types from other modules
+- Copy-safe detail: Single-file re-export hub; no internal logic
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Next, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for the Hono framework including handlers, routes, middleware, and validation types
+- Copy-safe detail: Heavy template literal types and conditional types for TypeScript type-level programming
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (extends), RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono entry-point class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Constructor sets up router; inherits all HonoBase functionality
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: class methods (get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use), route(), basePath(), onError(), notFound(), mount(), fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, Env types, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, MountOptionHandler, MountReplaceRequest, MountOptions, H, RouterRoute, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Schema, HonoBase export
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono class providing HTTP method handlers, middleware composition, routing, and request dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: Private _basePath and #path properties; implements routing and request handling logic
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, exports (Render, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, ContextOptions, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit, TEXT_PLAIN)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env types, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, ResponseHeader, BaseMime, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, resolveCallbackPhase, HtmlEscapedDatePhase, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime, ./utils/secure-headers, ./utils/cookie
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class providing response creation, headers, variables, and renderer utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Private constructor properties (#rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, etc.); finalization pattern
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest function
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input types, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, ParseBodyOptions, BodyData, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request parsing class providing path, query, header, body parsing and validated data access
+- Copy-safe detail: Private validatedData and #matchResult; body caching strategy
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Singleton constant for request match result symbol
+- Copy-safe detail: Single unique symbol export; zero dependencies
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions type, ParseBody interface
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utilities for form data, URL-encoded data, and JSON content
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-heavy module with nested conditional types for body parsing
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types, Env, Next, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition helper that chains handlers in sequence
+- Copy-safe detail: Stateless function returning dispatch closure; throws on multiple next() calls
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for authentication failures and programmatic errors
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple constructor accepting status code and optional response/message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc export, parseResponse, DetailedError, public types (InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode)
+- Internal names noticed: (none - re-exports only)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./hono, ./hono-base, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP client with typed responses, request types, and error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Barrel-file re-export hub for client modules
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class, fetch method, $url, $path, $ws methods
+- Internal names noticed: buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, deepMerge, createProxy, Callback, ClientRequestOptions, FormData, BodyInit, ValidationTargets, WebSocket, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client proxy builder that constructs request paths and executes fetch calls
+- Copy-safe detail: Proxy pattern using createProxy; supports parameterized URLs and query params
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, TypedURL, Response, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, InferEndpointType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, PickResponseByStatusCode, Callback, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickSchema
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, BuildSearchParamsFn, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, ResponseFormat, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, ToSchema, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, HonoBase, H, RouterRoute
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ./types, ./http-status, /utils/types, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for the HTTP client including endpoints, responses, paths and URL construction
+- Copy-safe detail: Very heavy type module with literal-type programming and extensive conditional types
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError export
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, DetailedError (imported)
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./client/fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utilities for URL manipulation, request merging, and response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Helper functions for client-side URL/path operations
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Response parsing and error handling for fetch calls with smart content-type detection
+- Copy-safe detail: Independent module; auto-detects response type (json vs text) from content-type headers
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function, handle function export
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers a Hono app with the fetch event
+- Copy-safe detail: Thin wrapper that calls handle() and registers fetch event listener
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function export, HandleOptions type, Handler type
+- Internal names noticed: Env, Schema, FetchEvent, Hono, globalThis.fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler that dispatches requests to the Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: Uses app.fetch() with optional fallback fetch; responds via evt.respondWith()
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface definition for event handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Minimal types; extends ExtendableEvent with Service Worker specific properties
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
